results.title: All Reviews – DEPULEY
results.content:
N

    DLLT 42 In Modern Crystal Retractable Invisible Blades Fandelier, LED Chandelier Ceiling Fan with Lights and Remote for Bedroom, Living Room, 3 Color Changeable 3000K-6000K, Reversible DC Motor, 6 Speed, Silver  
   Nige H.

Stunning light & fan

Firstly the downsides - it takes a long time to assemble and install, especially preparing and hanging the crystal balls on the light, and I find it slightly frustrating that you can't dim the lights, which are very bright, so you have to switch it off/on to change the light colour., which is slightly frustrating. We also used a professional to install as we needed to install a timber batten in our loft to support the weight, so unless you are very confident, I would suggest you use a professional electrician to install. [...] All in all, this was expertly designed. The appearance of the ceiling fan is gorgeous. I don't have any other "Industrial" themed decor, this is our first. Based on all these features and facts, I certainly do recommend this to other consumers. i did not find any defects, damage or missing parts. Everything is as claimed in the advertisement. Thank you for reading my review, I hope it was informative and useful. :)

R

    26'' Farmhouse Caged Ceiling Fan with Lights Remote Control, Flush Mount Bladeless Rustic Ceiling Fan for Low Ceiling Indoor Living Room Bedroom Kitchen  
   Rock

Rugged style

This rugged fan is quite unique. Two layers of rounded metal wirings around 4 light bulbs, with the fan in the middle. Very industrial looking and tough feeling. [...] Light is good, third one I bought and looks good up

## More Relevant Posts

View organization page for Pinakinvox Private limited

59 followers

You build a great Android app.
It looks perfect on your phone.
Then you launch and find it's broken on 30% of your users' devices.
Here is the reality:
Android isn't one platform.
It is a fragmented mess of screen sizes, OS versions, and hardware specs.
The real cost isn't the initial build.
It's the "silent" maintenance—like when a new OS update kills your background execution or drains your user's battery.
If you don't plan for the Play Store approval maze or legacy system integration, your launch date is just a guess.
We broke down the specific traps that trip up most business owners in our latest piece.
Read the full breakdown here: [...] A purchase button is the easy part.
The real work starts after the user taps Buy.
A reliable in app purchase flow should handle more than a paywall:
• Product and plan selection
• Store payment flow
• Purchase verification
• Premium access or entitlement
• Subscription status
• Restore purchases
• Cancellation and pending payments
• Failed payment recovery
• Expiry, renewal, and refund handling
A user should not pay successfully and then wonder:
“Why is premium still locked?”
That is why IAP is not just a UI feature. It is a full product flow.
A good implementation should make the experience clear:
→ User chooses a plan
→ Apple App Store or Google Play processes payment
→ Purchase is verified
→ Premium access is granted [...] View organization page for GuitarCare

4 followers

results.title: Dupely
results.content: Dupely (2mo): That "50% off" deal on Amazon? The price was raised two weeks ago. That's not some "glitch". That's how online marketplaces work today. Prices get inflated before "sales." Reviews get manipulated. Identical products get listed dozens of times at wildly different prices. And no existing tool actually solves this. They just hand you a coupon code and hope for the best. So we built Dupely. Our AI works in real time while you shop to: → Detect pricing games and flag inflated "deals" → Surface better-value alternatives ranked by our proprietary Dupe Score → Analyze seller trust signals and review authenticity → Show you the right product at the right price, not just the cheapest one Alpha users saved an average of 38% per purchase. Average product price dropped from $45 to $28, [...] ## Posts [...] purchase. Average product price dropped from $45 to $28, without sacrificing quality. Early Access is now open! 👉 Sign up to get the download link → dupely.io Available as a browser extension + mobile app. [Likes: 13, Comments: 0]; Dupely (4mo): We just opened the beta waitlist for Dupely. This has been years of watching online shopping get louder, messier, and less honest, and deciding to actually do something about it. Too many identical products, fake certainty, manipulated prices, and reviews you can’t trust. Dupely is built to cut through that and give people confidence at the moment they’re about to buy. No hype. No gimmicks. Just clarity. We put together a short intro video to show what we’re building and why. If you’ve ever hesitated before clicking buy because something felt off,

results.title: Dupely: The Trust Layer for Online Shopping - ProductDirs
results.content:
Dupely serves as a crucial trust layer for online shopping, aiming to empower consumers by combating common forms of manipulation. The platform is designed for shoppers who are wary of deceptive practices such as artificial price drops, fake reviews, and inflated markups from white-label sellers. Its core purpose is to provide transparency and confidence in every online purchase. Online shopping, while convenient, is often fraught with challenges that erode consumer trust. Shoppers frequently encounter misleading pricing strategies, inauthentic reviews that sway purchasing decisions, and influencers promoting products without genuine endorsement. Furthermore, the proliferation of resellers offering the same items at higher prices creates an environment where consumers struggle to find [...] ### Who is this for?

Dupely is designed for online shoppers who are concerned about deceptive practices and seek to make informed purchasing decisions. This includes consumers wary of artificial price drops, fake reviews, and inflated prices from resellers. It is particularly beneficial for individuals who frequently shop online and want to ensure they are getting genuine value and dealing with credible vendors. The tool aims to empower everyday shoppers, providing them with the confidence to navigate the complexities of e-commerce and avoid common pitfalls. [...] creates an environment where consumers struggle to find genuine value and reliable vendors. Dupely was developed to address these pervasive issues, offering a solution that prioritizes consumer protection and informed decision-making. One of Dupely's key features is DupeScore, which identifies identical products available at lower prices across different listings. This allows users to easily find the best deals without compromising on the product itself. By comparing various offerings, DupeScore ensures that consumers are not overpaying for the same item, directly combating price gouging and hidden markups. Another significant capability is "Trust This Price," which analyzes a product's price history over the past 90 days. This feature is instrumental in flagging artificial price drops, a

results.title: Dupely Review - AI Tool Features and Tips
results.content:
Last modified:  July 7, 2026  | Fred Magni

Ever felt that pang of buyer’s remorse, wondering if you overpaid for that sweet gadget or must-have accessory? Meet Dupely, the digital sidekick engineered to combat overpaying. It’s not just a tool; it’s your personal trust layer for online shopping, meticulously designed to unearth identical products at genuinely better prices across marketplaces, all without ever leaving your current page. Think of it as your shopping superpower, ensuring every click is a smart buy.

Visit WebsiteHave an AI Tool? Submit it here! [...] ## Target Audience: The Smart Shopper’s Profile

If you’re tired of digital FOMO (Fear Of Missing Out on a better deal) or simply value intelligent purchasing, Dupely is your essential browser companion. It’s built for:

   The Amazon Enthusiast: Initially optimized for Amazon, providing unparalleled insights on products from this giant marketplace.
   The Budget-Conscious Buyer: Anyone looking to maximize their savings without compromising on product quality or authenticity.
   The Trust-Seeking Consumer: Shoppers who demand verification that they’re getting the exact product they intend, from a reliable source.
   The Efficiency Evangelist: Those who appreciate a single, powerful tool to simplify their deal-hunting without endless tab-hopping or coupon searching. [...] Submit Your Tool →
   DupeScore™ & MatchScore™: A proprietary algorithm that scores product matches from 0-100, confirming identical items and their authenticity.
   Real-time Price Intelligence: Surfacing daily price drops, live deals, and deals of the day the moment they hit.
   Bestseller & Viral Dupes: Identifies cheaper twins of popular Amazon bestsellers and trending products.
   Early Promo Codes: Applies working codes at checkout and gives you a heads-up on promotions before they even go live.
   Verified Seller Check: No gray-market listings. Dupely ensures you buy from trusted, verified sellers, guaranteeing product authenticity.

Typical Savings30–75% on best-selling products
Core TechnologyImage, spec, and seller info analysis for identical product detection
